user.title: Add Friendly Scene Flip
user.description: Create a new scene flip that toggles between two scenes.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this scene flip (e.g., 'Living Room Lights').
data_description.scene_a: The scene to use for slot A (the initial 'on' scene).
data_description.scene_b: The scene to use for slot B (the initial 'off' scene).

abort.already_configured: This scene flip is already configured.
